hero.title: Personal Stylist
hero.tagline: "a wardrobe that reflects you and works as a system"

philosophy.label: About me
philosophy.heading: Style is communication|before you say a word
philosophy.p1: My name is Margarita, and I'm a personal stylist.
philosophy.p2: For me, style is about confidence, comfort, and authenticity. It's the connection between how you feel inside and how you present yourself to the world.
philosophy.p3: I enjoy helping people unlock their potential through style and believe it can become a powerful tool of self-expression.
philosophy.p4: Rather than encouraging impulsive purchases, I focus on thoughtful styling and the potential of well-chosen wardrobe pieces.
philosophy.p5: For over 4 years, I've been working as a personal stylist. I've also styled photoshoots and previously created my own brand of leather bags and accessories.
philosophy.quote: Style is communication before you say a word. It is your quiet power.

wardrobe.title: Wardrobe Audit
wardrobe.desc: You often find yourself staring at a full closet but still feel like you have nothing to wear. We go through every piece together, build outfit formulas, and create a shopping list for the missing essentials.
wardrobe.duration: Online - 15 business days. Offline - up to 4 hrs (each additional hour + S$ 100)

for: You often find yourself staring at a full closet but still feel like you have nothing to wear.
You need efficient outfit formulas to get dressed faster in the morning.
You've experienced life changes, like moving to a new city or starting a new job, and need a wardrobe update.
Your current wardrobe doesn't reflect who you are now or how you wish to present yourself.
online_steps: Style Quiz — you'll start by completing a short quiz. It helps me understand your lifestyle, preferences, and goals before we begin.
Pre-Consultation — we'll have a quick chat to connect, make sure the energy flows well between us, and set a convenient day for your wardrobe audit.

The analysis can be done in two formats: photo and video:

• Photo Analysis: You send me photos and videos of all the items on the clean surface (background) and the same items on you. I create a presentation, and we choose a convenient time to discuss all the details via Zoom.

• Video Analysis: We schedule a convenient time for a video call and analyze everything live. You will receive a file with all the recommendations, screenshots of the outfits we created, and a shopping list a few days after the call.
You have 2 extra weeks to ask me any questions that arise about the wardrobe review, new pieces, or any wardrobe-related issues.
offline_steps: Style Quiz — you'll start by completing a short quiz. It helps me understand your lifestyle, preferences, and goals before we begin.
Pre-Consultation — we'll have a quick chat to connect, make sure the energy flows well between us, and set a convenient day for your wardrobe audit.
Wardrobe Audit (at your home) — on the scheduled day, I come to your place and together we go through every single piece in your closet.

Final Report — within 14 business days, you'll receive a personalized file that includes a summary of everything we discussed, styling recommendations + shopping links for all key missing pieces to make your wardrobe more versatile and functional.
You have 2 extra weeks to ask me any questions that arise about the wardrobe review, new pieces, or any wardrobe-related issues.
details.notes:
One session typically lasts up to 4 hours. If your wardrobe is extensive, we may plan a second session — after 4 hours, it becomes mentally draining for both of us (trust me!).

During the session, I take photos of all the items we decide to keep. Then uploaded to a special app, where your entire wardrobe will live in one convenient place. You'll be able to browse your looks, plan outfits, mix and match pieces, and easily see what you already own — all from your phone.

shopping.title: Shopping curation
shopping.desc:
A service designed to fulfill your wardrobe with new items, helping to create a fully functional wardrobe or complement existing one for the season.
Please note: this service can be used only after we have completed «Wardrobe Audit», so I already know what is missing.
If you want to create a wardrobe from scratch, please refer to the «Capsule Wardrobe» service.
shopping.duration: Online: 7–10 business days. Offline: up to 4 hrs (each additional hour + S$ 100)

for: We've completed a wardrobe audit and you want me to find the new pieces we agreed on.
You want me to fullfill your wardrobe and choose the best from available options.
online_steps: We will schedule a call to discuss your request and details.
I create a list of items relevant to your needs and style direction.
Within 10 business days you will receive a file with a shopping list with the looks and links to the items recommend trying. Complete outfit suggestions incorporating items from the shopping list.

Two weeks of follow-up support to address any issues with the items as they arrive. I will find and recommend alternative products if needed. You also can ask me any questions that arise about the wardrobe review, new pieces, or any wardrobe-related issues.
offline_steps: We schedule a pre-consultation to discuss your request and details.
We create a list of items relevant to your needs and style direction.
I do a pre-shopping and create a shopping route, reserve items in offline stores and showrooms for your convenience and to save your time. And after we go try everything on.
Plus we combine offline and online purchases due to limited stock and sizing. The offline session takes up to 4 hours (every hour after will cost 100 S$).
You have 2 weeks of my full support to ask me any questions that arise about the wardrobe review, new pieces, or any wardrobe-related issues.
details.offline_notes:
This service is a combined approach due to the specifics of shopping in Singapore. For mass-market and mid-range items, I do recommend ordering online from my curated selections and trying the items at home (via video, photos, or an in-person visit) due to the limitations of store availability. For luxury items, you have the option to select the shopping method you prefer, but stock is very limited as well.

Eventually, online shopping usually provides a better range and selection, making it easier to find unique and special items with the convenience of home fitting. If this option isn't suitable, I will create a shopping route, reserve items in offline stores and showrooms, and assist you in selecting items. I respect your time and aim to offer the best service possible.
details.notes:
I carefully check the quality of each item, its fit, and provide size recommendations. However, due to significant differences in sizing across brands, sometimes a piece may not fit as expected. Please remember: in such cases, the issue is not you — it's simply the brand's sizing.

I also cannot take responsibility for possible differences in product quality, as occasionally an item may look different in reality than we initially expected.

Each selected item can be replaced up to two times.

Whenever possible, I choose items and brands with convenient return policies to ensure your comfort and peace of mind. I am here to assist you with placing orders, returns, or any related questions.

Purchasing everything at once can sometimes feel mentally overwhelming due to the financial investment and volume of new information.

It's also important to remember that the true potential of a piece often becomes clear only once you try it on. That's why I encourage you to trust the process and give a chance even to items you might initially doubt — they often turn out to be the best finds.

Working with a stylist can bring a lot of new insights, so give yourself a little time to adjust. With time, everything will naturally fall into place.

capsule.title: Capsule wardrobe
capsule.desc: Creating a capsule wardrobe involves selecting pieces that work seamlessly together, tailored to your style and needs. Saves your time that would otherwise be spent scrolling online or in stores. Ensures that you purchase only items that truly fit, you like, and will be used.
capsule.duration: around 20 business days (depending on capsule size)

for: You want to save a significant amount of time that would otherwise be spent shopping in stores or online.
You want to have a comprehensive selection of outfit formulas where all pieces coordinate with each other for any occasion.
You want to be sure that you purchase only items that not only catches your eye but also truly fit and will be used, within a price range that suits you.
steps: Quiz and style test — helps me understand your lifestyle, preferences, and goals.
Pre-consultation — to discuss your expectations, ask questions and see if we share the same vision.

Creating a file — it takes around 14–20 days to create the capsule (depending on its size). You will receive a functional selection of items that coordinate well together, offering various combinations and purposes from a relatively small number of pieces (quantity and budget are discussed in advance).
After you receive the file, we schedule a follow-up call where I explain how it works and answer all your questions.
You have 2 extra weeks of my full support and guidance throughout the ordering process, including finding alternatives and discussing fit and nuances in online shopping.
details.notes: Quality is my priority, which might lead to higher costs. I will present several options but focus on durable, stylish pieces, avoiding too much synthetic material from mass-market brands. The capsule is built from new pieces only (up to 5 items from your existing wardrobe can be included).

event.title: Event / shoot looks
event.desc: For any event where you need to look your best and feel confident — be it a wedding, a public appearance, or a formal gathering — we'll create the perfect outfit. Same for the photoshoot

for: You need to look your best and feel confident at an important event.
You're preparing for a wedding, public appearance, photoshoot, or formal gathering.
steps: We will have a consultation for the main points: budget, style, and preferences.
I will then put together 3 outfit options considering the theme and dress code of the event and send those choices for you to pick the best one.
The outfit can either be assembled from your current wardrobe or include new items and accessories tailored for your event.
details.notes: The price for this service varies depending on the complexity of the outfit and the work format. From 250 S$ per outfit (3 different options).

mentoring.title: Monthly Mentoring
mentoring.desc: Unlimited access to your stylist. Save with booking a 3-month subscription
mentoring.duration: S$ 120 / week. S$ 350 / month. S$ 300 / 3 month

for: We’ve already worked together and you want my consistent support to maintain and grow your style.
You don’t want to go back to your old habits and keep buying pieces that will end up sitting unworn in your closet.
You often doubt your choices and want to have a professional "on call" to guide you.
You want to shop smarter — saving time, money, and energy while investing only in what truly works for you.
steps: You can reach out anytime during the day. I'm here to support you, guide your choices, and help you stay confident in your decisions. (We agree on communication hours individually so you can always count on my timely response within my working schedule.)
Shopping guidance — planning a store visit or shopping online? Message me before or during your shopping trip — I'll help you decide whether a piece is worth buying or better to skip.
Outfit and item curation — creating outfits for various occasions.

Support in choosing specific categories (e.g. "I need the perfect white shirt" or "help me find everyday jeans"). I'll help you find what you're looking for — from the right silhouette to the right store — with attention to quality, fit, and value.
details.notes: I provide professional advice and recommendations, but final decisions remain entirely yours. My goal is to guide, not to impose — helping you make conscious, confident, and independent style choices.

1.title: Style Quiz
1.desc: A short questionnaire designed to help me understand you better — your lifestyle, preferences, and personal goals.

2.title: Pre - Consultation
2.desc: A call where we connect, align on your goals and vision, discuss key details, and schedule a convenient time to begin.

3.title: Core Process
3.desc: I create a file for a service you choose and carefully develop all styling materials tailored to you.

4.title: Result
4.desc: You receive a personalized file with detailed recommendations, complete outfit combinations, shopping links, your style direction, and all essential insights.

5.title: Support
5.desc: For 2 weeks after receiving the file, you have my full support during working hours for any questions, adjustments, or guidance you may need.

pricing.label: Pricing
pricing.note: All prices in S$. Each additional hour billed separately.

wardrobe_audit.title: Wardrobe Audit
wardrobe_audit.desc: Offline (up to 4 hrs, each extra hour + S$ 100) or online (15 business days)

shopping.title: Shopping Assistance
shopping.desc: Personal shopping day offline (up to 4 hrs, + S$ 100/hr) or online curation (7–10 business days)

travel_capsule.title: Travel Capsule Wardrobe
travel_capsule.desc: Up to 15 items — vacation, business trip, or any focused wardrobe need. 7–10 business days.

seasonal_capsule.title: Seasonal Capsule Wardrobe
seasonal_capsule.desc: Up to 30 items for the full season. 14–20 business days. Complete outfit combinations included.

event.title: Event / Photoshoot Styling
event.desc: 3 outfit options tailored to your event. Price varies by complexity and format.

experience.label: Values
experience.1: dress for the woman you are becoming

modal.for_whom: This service is for you if:
